title: Ping Tagger
description: Ping Tagger is a Minecraft PvP mod that allows you to view a players ping beside their username. This works on all servers, including custom nametags.
body:
![player with ping tags enabled](https://i.ibb.co/nMLdZTMF/2026-04-22-20-29-26-3.png)
Ping Tagger is a mod that shows a players ping in their nametag. This works on almost all servers, including those with custom nametags. 

This mod is client sided, and does not require the server to install the mod. To turn the mod on and off, bind the "Toggle Ping Tagger" in controls. 

If you have any issues, please open an issue in the github.
